title: This year is on track to be the hottest year EVER, with global temps hitting dangerous new highs. Here’s what that means: 	•	🌡️ For the first time, Earth’s average temp could pass 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels. 	•	💸 The U.S. has already seen 24 billion-dollar weather disasters this year—just 15 days apart on average! 	•	🌀 From hurricanes to heatwaves, these disasters are hitting harder and more often. Extreme weather isn’t random—it’s fueled by pollution trapping heat in our atmosphere. We can’t ignore the signs. What do you think it will take to turn this around?
